title: Warehouse Manager
description: Calculate total cubic footage stored in each warehouse (volume = units × Width × Length × Height).
constraints: (name, product_id) is the primary key of Warehouse
product_id is the primary key of Products — product names are unique
key_concept: SUM of expression (multi-column multiplication). JOIN then aggregate.

hints.L1: Join Warehouse with Products. Volume per row = units * product dimensions. SUM per warehouse.
hints.L2: SELECT w.name, SUM(w.units * p.Width * p.Length * p.Height) AS volume FROM Warehouse w JOIN Products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY w.name
hints.L3: SELECT w.name AS warehouse_name, SUM(w.units * p.Width * p.Length * p.Height) AS volume FROM Warehouse w JOIN Products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY w.name
